极速快3计划群【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-237847581_63220730<br>vk.com/topic-238756407_63015515<br>vk.com/topic-238756405_61474209<br>vk.com/topic-238620163_61828621<br>vk.com/topic-238657517_63015559<br>vk.com/topic-238651552_62181344<br>vk.com/topic-238625997_63015569<br>vk.com/topic-231239259_62372196<br>vk.com/topic-238657501_63220810<br>vk.com/topic-238756390_62685195<br>vk.com/topic-231239255_61474262<br>vk.com/topic-238626047_63015620<br>vk.com/topic-237848086_61914033<br>vk.com/topic-238657508_62068642<br>vk.com/topic-238756396_61914044<br>vk.com/topic-237847581_63220896<br>vk.com/topic-238756407_63015660<br>vk.com/topic-238756405_61474334<br>vk.com/topic-238657517_63015710<br>vk.com/topic-238651552_62181509<br>vk.com/topic-238620163_61828809<br>vk.com/topic-238625997_63015724<br>vk.com/topic-238657501_63220968<br>vk.com/topic-231239259_62372373<br>vk.com/topic-238756390_62685375<br>vk.com/topic-231239255_61474395<br>vk.com/topic-238626047_63015784<br>vk.com/topic-237848086_61914171<br>vk.com/topic-238657508_62068809<br>vk.com/topic-238756396_61914185<br>vk.com/topic-237847581_63221075<br>vk.com/topic-238756407_63015830<br>vk.com/topic-238756405_61474469<br>vk.com/topic
